answer: A pratyāhāra is formed by combining the first sound of a desired group with a marker letter (N, K, Ñ, C, T, N, M, Ñ, Ṣ, Ś, V, Y, R, L) that appears at or after the last sound of the group. It refers to all sounds from the starting sound up to but not including the position of the marker.
